home.title: Become fluent in Slovene
home.description: Slovenscina Korak za Korakom personalized Slovene lessons tailored to your goals. Learn online at your convenience with experienced teachers and join a supportive community of over 1,700 members. Start today and achieve your language goals with Slovenscina Korak za Korakom!

about.title: About us
about.description: At Slovenscina Korak za Korakom, we are dedicated to providing personalized Slovenian language learning experiences. Our team of experienced teachers, combined with a flexible schedule, ensures that you can learn at your own pace.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Explore Slovenscina Korak za Korakom pricing plans for private lessons and language club sessions. Flexible options for every learning goal and budget.

not-found.title: Not Found
not-found.description: The page you are looking for could not be found. Return to Slovenscina Korak za Korakom and continue your Slovenian learning journey.
